query:
SELECT f.id, f.lead_id, f.corretor_id, f.tentativa_atual, f.max_tentativas, f.status, f.proxima_tentativa, l.nome as lead_nome, u.name as corretor_nome 
FROM follow_ups f 
LEFT JOIN leads l ON f.lead_id = l.id 
LEFT JOIN users u ON f.corretor_id = u.id 
WHERE f.status = 'ativo' 
ORDER BY f.proxima_tentativa 
LIMIT 20;

FROM follow_ups f 
LEFT JOIN leads l ON f.lead_id = l.id 
LEFT JOIN users u ON f.corretor_id = u.id 
WHERE f.status = 'ativo'

LIMIT 20;
